rows.label: qev041204_MSG0002
rows.name:
You really went and defeated
that entire savage group-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041204_MSG0003
rows.name:
With that much brawn,
you could easily make a living as a bodyguard-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041204_MSG0004
rows.name:
Well, I can't really get used to the nature of
trying to resolve business through sheer force, though...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041204_MSG0005
rows.name: But things like that do happen on extremely rare occasions in this world-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041204_MSG0006
rows.name: Wait, this isn't the time to be relaxing-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041204_MSG0007
rows.name:
Since we picked a fight with Growth,
if we don't run away we'll get eaten-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041204_MSG0008
rows.name:
Mumun is going to run-mo!
You should all hurry up and run away too-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041204_MSG0009
rows.name: If we are still alive, we'll meet again-mo![ST:wait ]
